case_title: IN RE: STRUCTURED ASSET FUNDING, LLC
cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (for approval of transfer of structured settlement payment rights)

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100007575) FILED BY PETITIONER STRUCTURED ASSET FUNDING, LLC HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS FILED BY PETITIONER STRUCTURED ASSET FUNDING, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT ETCHEVERRIA, BERNARD
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100007575) FILED BY PETITIONER STRUCTURED ASSET FUNDING, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER STRUCTURED ASSET FUNDING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS DENIED BECAUSE RESPONDENT IS SELLING FUTURE MONTHLY LIFE CONTINGENT PAYMENTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $233,829.00 IN EXCHANGE OF $5,000.00. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Shafai of Law Offices of John Z. Shafai telephone number 310-788-2889 for Petitioners.
No other appearance was made in the matter.

Ruling: Counsel explained the terms of the transfer agreement. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER STRUCTURED ASSET FUNDING, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is denied because Respondent is selling future monthly life contingent payments in the amount of $233,829.00 in exchange of $5,000.00. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)
